name: caseAnalysis
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (LawEnforcementActionPanel.actCase: callMacro('caseAnalysis',{artifact:{data:parsed,title}}) → runDomain → {input:{artifact:{data,title}}} → sole-key peel at dispatch yields artifact.data). caseStrength = round(min(100,evidence*15)*0.4 + min(100,witnesses*20)*0.3 + min(100,suspectLinks*25)*0.3); prosecutable = caseStrength>=60; status strong>=80 / developing>=50 / insufficient. The CaseResult card renders caseId/caseStrength/status/evidenceCount/witnessCount/suspectCount/nextSteps[]/prosecutable EXACTLY — all returned by the handler (verified 2026-06-28). Non-array evidence/witnesses/suspects fall back to 0 counts (default `|| []`), never NaN. Component-exact-shape gate: server/tests/law-enforcement-lens-macros.test.js.
